name: Vladmir's Offering
description: An eerie mask that is haunted with the malice of a fallen vampire.

abilities.name: Vladmir's Aura
abilities.description: Increases the attack damage, mana regen, and armor of nearby allies, and grants them lifesteal. Radius: 1200. Attack Damage Bonus: 18%. Mana Regeneration Bonus: 1. Armor Bonus: 2. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
